steps.title: Find the intercept value
steps.content:
The $y$-intercept occurs when $x=0$. Substitute $0$ into the function.
$$f(0)=4^{-5(0+1)}=4^{-5}=\frac{1}{1{,}024}$$

steps.title: Display that coefficient
steps.content:
Separate the exponent into two parts.
$$4^{-5(x+1)}=4^{-5}4^{-5x}$$
$$4^{-5}4^{-5x}=\frac{1}{1{,}024}(\frac{1}{4})^{5x}$$
The answer is A.
